concerns.text: Plan references 'contracts/abs-summary.schema.yaml' and 'contracts/audit-record.schema.yaml' but actual files are 'contracts/ABSummary.schema.yaml' and 'contracts/AuditRecord.schema.yaml' (case mismatch). Update plan to match actual file names.

Plan P1-T03 mentions creating contract schemas but does not explicitly cover 'extracted_summary.schema.yaml', 'manifest.schema.yaml', 'synthetic_dataset.schema.yaml', and 'synthetic_validation.schema.yaml' which exist in contracts/ directory.

Data model defines 'ExtractedSummary' and 'Manifest' entities but plan does not explicitly reference these entities in any task description. Add explicit references to ensure plan-data-model alignment.
Plan specifies 'input/urls.csv' but data-model.md shows 'data/raw/urls.csv'. Similarly, plan uses 'output/' while data-model.md uses 'data/output/'. Standardize paths across documents.

ABSummary.schema.yaml contract includes fields 'variant_a_mean', 'variant_b_mean', 'variant_a_std', 'variant_b_std' for continuous outcomes, but data-model.md ABSummary entity does not define these fields. Align schema and data model.

AuditRecord.schema.yaml contract includes 'flag_size_mismatch', 'flag_missing_metric', 'flag_unverifiable' fields, but data-model.md AuditRecord entity only defines 'notes' for explanations. Align schema and data model.
Plan references 'README_QUICKSTART.md' but quickstart.md file exists. Update plan to reference correct file name.
SC-001 (extraction accuracy ≥95%) lacks explicit task coverage in plan. Add task reference or annotation showing how extraction accuracy will be validated.

Constitution Principle II (Verified Accuracy) requires title-token-overlap ≥0.7 for citations. Plan mentions 'Reference-Validator' but does not explicitly confirm this threshold is enforced. Add explicit threshold reference.
